title: fix: route Sana through fixed tunnel
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Routes Sana directly through the existing Lambda media tunnel instead of requiring backend registration.
- Keeps Flux and Z-Image on the dynamic GPU registry.
- Updates the Sana generation test to prove the fixed endpoint path and billing.

The tunnel maps `ltx2-backend.pollinations.ai/generate` to Sana on localhost:8766; existing LTX2 routes are unchanged.

Checks:
- Focused Sana generation and billing test passed
- Gen typecheck passed
- Live tunnel generation returned HTTP 200

gist.headline: Sana found the tunnel
gist.blurb: Sana now takes the sturdy little media tunnel straight to generation, rather than waiting around for a registry introduction. Flux and Z-Image keep their usual GPU registry route; everyone has a path home.
gist.summary: Sana image requests in gen.pollinations.ai now route directly to the fixed Lambda media tunnel at ltx2-backend.pollinations.ai/generate (mapped to localhost:8766), while Flux and Z-Image remain on the dynamic GPU registry.
gist.impact: Sana generation and billing now work through a tested fixed endpoint path, with live tunnel requests returning HTTP 200 and no changes to existing LTX2 routes.
gist.visual_concept: Depict Sana as a glowing pixel-art image seed traveling safely through a cozy underground garden tunnel toward a retro generation terminal. Polly wears a tiny tunnel-worker helmet and guides the seed along the fixed route, while separate signposted garden paths lead Flux and Z-Image toward a dynamic GPU greenhouse; include flowers and code-vines to show reliable routing.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly, the cute yellow-and-brown striped bee mascot with pink blush, light blue wings, and a tiny miner helmet, guiding a glowing image seed through a sturdy lime green (#ecf874) garden tunnel into a retro terminal labeled "SANA". Nearby, signposts point Flux and Z-Image toward a softly glowing GPU greenhouse amid code-plants and flowers; cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes, nostalgic but beautiful.
